D:\ToolChain\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\app.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\CODE\C++\Proj\ScoreManagement\bin\app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,D:\CODE\C++\Proj\ScoreManagement\bin\libapp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
